channel.title: Vienna Public Transport — Disruptions & Commuter Info
channel.description: Active disruptions, construction works and restrictions from official sources (Wiener Linien, ÖBB, VOR/VAO, City of Vienna).

item.title: U2/U5: Bacherplatz from Arbeitergasse to Schwarzhorngasse
item.description: Detailed information about the construction project U2 / U5 can be obtained via the ombudsperson of the respective metro section. [Since 28.02.2021]
item.content:encoded:
Detailed information about the construction project U2 / U5 can be obtained via the ombudsperson of the respective metro section.
[Since 28.02.2021]

item.title: Maxingstraße from crossing Hanselmayergasse to crossing Trauttmansdorffgasse
item.description: The affected bus lines are redirected, the passenger information is provided by Wiener Linien GmbH & Co KG. The installation of a district heating line … [Since 06.04.2026]
item.content:encoded:
The affected bus lines are redirected, the passenger information is provided by Wiener Linien GmbH & Co KG. The installation of a district heating line …
[Since 06.04.2026]

item.title: Maurer Long alley from Kunkegasse to Maurer Long alley 64
item.description: In the plateau area Geßlgasse, however, the work takes place at night during the idle time of the affected public transport. [12.04.2026 – 29.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
In the plateau area Geßlgasse, however, the work takes place at night during the idle time of the affected public transport.
[12.04.2026 – 29.05.2026]

item.title: Linzer Straße from junction Hüttelbergstraße and Bergmillergasse to junction Wolfersberggasse
item.description: The stop of the affected bus lines at the Bujattigasse will be temporarily moved to the Wolfersberggasse ON 1. [19.04.2026 – 31.07.2026]
item.content:encoded:
The stop of the affected bus lines at the Bujattigasse will be temporarily moved to the Wolfersberggasse ON 1.
[19.04.2026 – 31.07.2026]

item.title: Simonygasse ggü. 2B
item.description: Only the house connections (carriage crossings) at night (maximum 5 nights) in the idle time of the tram with the free keeping of at least 3,50 m wide … [26.04.2026 – 03.07.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Only the house connections (carriage crossings) at night (maximum 5 nights) in the idle time of the tram with the free keeping of at least 3,50 m wide …
[26.04.2026 – 03.07.2026]

item.title: Otto-Probst-Straße crossing Tesarekplatz
item.description: The public bus lines affected in the construction site area will be redirected accordingly. [04.05.2026 – 14.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
The public bus lines affected in the construction site area will be redirected accordingly.
[04.05.2026 – 14.06.2026]

item.title: U2/U5: Kirchengasse 1 to 30
item.description: In the Lindengasse / Kirchengasse crossing area and in the Kirchengasse at the height of ON 1 and ON 20-22, the underground station digs into the shafts. [Since 28.02.2021]
item.content:encoded:
In the Lindengasse / Kirchengasse crossing area and in the Kirchengasse at the height of ON 1 and ON 20-22, the underground station digs into the shafts.
[Since 28.02.2021]

item.title: U2: Right Vienna line from crossing Ramperstorffergasse to crossing Pilgramgasse and Pilgrambrücke
item.description: For the new construction of the underground station of the U2 Pilgramgasse, the right-hand Vienna line from the Ramperstorffergasse to the Pilgramgasse is blocked for vehicle traffic. [Since 28.02.2021]
item.content:encoded:
For the new construction of the underground station of the U2 Pilgramgasse, the right-hand Vienna line from the Ramperstorffergasse to the Pilgramgasse is blocked for vehicle traffic.
[Since 28.02.2021]

item.title: U5: Währinger Straße 40-42 to 54
item.description: The cable laying work (110 kV conversion as preliminary work for the U5) will be carried out during the day and, if necessary, during the night, during the time from 22:00 to 05:00 at … [11.01.2026 – 31.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
The cable laying work (110 kV conversion as preliminary work for the U5) will be carried out during the day and, if necessary, during the night, during the time from 22:00 to 05:00 at …
[11.01.2026 – 31.05.2026]

item.title: U5: Spitalgasse from 29 to 33
item.description: The cable laying work (110 kV conversion as preliminary work for the U5) is carried out during the day, blocking of the pavement and construction of a replacement platform at least 2.00 m wide on … [11.01.2026 – 31.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
The cable laying work (110 kV conversion as preliminary work for the U5) is carried out during the day, blocking of the pavement and construction of a replacement platform at least 2.00 m wide on …
[11.01.2026 – 31.05.2026]
